title: scabiosa pyrenaica var. tomentosa
intro: Scabiosa pyrenaica var. tomentosa, also known as the woolly scabious, is a perennial herb belonging to the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Scabiosa pyrenaica var. tomentosa include its ability to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and act as a natural antihistamine. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support the immune system and alleviate various health conditions.
